hero.mission: « Living differently to study, work and grow »
hero.title: Become a partner
hero.subtitle: Associate your brand with a Malagasy housing solution and reach a young, urban and active audience. From independent status to large companies and real estate networks, there is a status adapted to each structure.

why.title: Why become a partner?
why.subtitle: Sarintany'COLOC is the reference site for colocation in Madagascar.
why.launchText: Launch 2026: several statuses offered to the first partners. Contact us to discover the conditions.

audience.title: Targeted audience
audience.desc: Students, young professionals and families: a young, urban and active audience.

rse.title: CSR commitment
rse.desc: Display the « Committed Partner » signage and associate your image with housing.

visibility.title: Maximum visibility
visibility.desc: Your logo and partner page visible to all visitors.

data.title: Exclusive data
data.desc: Traffic statistics, personas, attractive cities and tension zones.

statuts.title: Partner statuses
statuts.subtitle: Four families of partners, with evolving levels and benefits.

entreprise.title: General company
entreprise.subtitle: From SME to large enterprise, increasing visibility.

realEstate.title: Real estate
realEstate.subtitle: From independent agent to national network.

addon.title: Option · Exclusive regional banner
addon.subtitle: An exclusive full-width banner at the bottom of the map, contextual to the displayed region.
addon.note: 1st banner included at Platinum and Network Platinum levels · up to 5 regions in total.

bronze.name: SME · Bronze
bronze.arg: Be referenced as an official partner of the site and display your CSR commitment.

silver.name: Company · Silver
silver.arg: Move ahead of other SMEs, with a direct link to your point of sale.
silver.benefit3: Point of interest on the map

gold.name: Large company · Gold
gold.arg: The right profile in the right place, proven by data.
gold.benefit4: Native ads in the listings feed

independent.name: Independent
independent.arg: Risk-free: 4 months of visibility, one colocation concluded largely pays for itself.

agency.name: Agency
agency.arg: A profitable acquisition channel, qualified leads and partner status for your office.

network.name: Agency network
network.arg: The maximum network offer: national coverage and regional exclusivity.

publicSilver.name: Silver Sponsor
publicSilver.arg: Associate your institution with the emancipation of young people through housing.

publicGold.name: Gold Sponsor
publicGold.arg: A rewarding sponsorship, close to the project's development.

contact.title: Ready to join Sarintany'COLOC?
contact.subtitle: Tell us who you are: we'll guide you to the most suitable status.
contact.name: Name & Structure
contact.activityPlaceholder: Your activity and the status you're interested in
contact.callback: I would like to be called back
contact.thanksText: Your request has been noted — the Coloc'KOO team will get back to you shortly.

errors.emailjs: EmailJS credentials are not yet configured. Please set them in the project environment.

unavailable.title: Partners page unavailable
unavailable.subtitle: This feature is currently disabled by the global configuration. Please come back later.
